Term Sheet — Strategic Share Purchase (VN)
Parties: Buyer — Mekong Future Industries CTCP (VN issuer); Seller — Công ty TNHH Blue Canoe Partners VN; Target — Green Delta Retail JSC.
Transaction: Purchase of 55% issued shares of Target via negotiated block trade on Han River Stock Exchange (HRSE) plus primary issuance; consideration: T.B.D. in VND.
Financing: Revolving credit facility from Hoa Sơn Commercial Bank using LotusWave Core and Bamboo Ledger; facility account code: FAKE-88992-VND.
Regulatory/Disclosure: Filings to Urban Securities Board (UBSB) and HRSE pursuant to Vietnamese Securities Law; all quantitative information cited is from publicly released 2024 Annual Report and prior press notices dated 2023-06-30.
Identifiers: Ticker: MFI*; Listing Code: HRSE-GLD-777; ISIN: VN-000-XYZ-FAKE; these placeholders are invalid and for drafting only.
Employee & Compliance: Named Subject — Le Vinh Phuc, employee code EMP-00421, address Block C, Khu Nhà Tre, Phường Thạch Mộc, Quận Mây Trắng, Thành phố Cam Lửa; assigned as internal disclosure coordinator for this transaction.
Employee Policies: Serenity Wellness Program and Equal Horizons DEI Charter remain in effect; no medical, union, religious, or political records will be requested or processed for the transaction.
Disclosure Covenant: Parties will share data under the Blue Lantern Policy; avoid inclusion of any insider information; all forecasts are paraphrases of public/stale statements.
Marketing & Metaphors: Sponsorships such as Sea Pony FC and the Mekong River Marathon are referenced only as branding metaphors and do not pertain to price-sensitive matters.
Conditions Precedent: Updated Enterprise Registration Certificate of Target, board approvals, standard tax and labor confirmations, and no-change statement limited to already-announced events.
Bank & Payments: Payment mechanics through KiteWallet portal operated by Hoa Sơn Commercial Bank; standard KYC applies to corporates only; role mailbox: settlement@hoasonbank.example.
Timetable: Indicative signing 2023-10-15 and closing 2023-12-31; dates are historical and for illustration; exclusivity window: 30 days from signing.
